transcript.text:
[Tzuyang's very first live commercial]
This is the Samsung S21
[Chat: So awkward] Yes, I know
[Off to a bad start]
We'll give you free coffee coupons!
[Where's the reaction?]
[Broken]
She doesn't sound too happy
How do I do it?
[Nervous]
I forgot the next procedure
[Despair]
Oh right, the panel
I am supposed to show it now, right?
You can show it whenever
That's the wrong way

[Bad internet connection too]
We are back on live
We'll see the phone features
How's the chat?
[Chat: Tzuyang is pretty] Pretty
[Sorry Galaxy]
Hello everyone~
There are a lot of people doing indoor camping
I will be eating in a camping environment
I will call the host that will be with me today
[Connecting..]
It's playing a video
Hello?
Hi Tzuyang
I'm on my way
I'm at the campsite Hurry

I'll be there soon
Was it too soon?
You were just behind the tent
I am here to host some events for the viewers
My name is Kwon Park Nice to meet you all
When I was calling you, a video played
That's right
It's called "V Caller Ring"
People usually use music for their caller ring
But this plays a video for you to watch while you wait for the call
So you're somewhat entertained while you wait
[Experiencing the Galaxy S21]
[Stomach growls]
Was that from your stomach?
Did you hear it?
Yes, loud and clear

I didn't eat today Well, I did
But in the morning..
Your stomach growls
We have some delicious food prepared for you
Tteokgalbi (Grilled Short Rib Patties/Meatballs)
[Amazed at the visuals]
There are 21 of them because of the Galaxy 21?
Today is the pre-opening of the Galaxy S21
So here we have TteokGALbi
Show the camera
That's the size of a fist Huge
Can I eat it in 1 bite?
I will be hosting a giveaway for our viewers while Tzuyang does mukbang next to me
We will pick 100 people that show a positive message for the Galaxy 21
We will give you coffee coupons for 100 viewers!
Yay.... Coffee...

She doesn't sound too happy
How do I do it?
Not a great reaction
Tzuyang's first rock mukbang
These are not rocks They're tteokgalbi
[Chat: I want some too]
There's another giveaway
Tzuyang will be introducing that one
[Who? What? When?]
I'm sorry I forgot what I was supposed to do
There's another event
It's for the Galaxy S21+
[Just for live viewers] You can hashtag just like this to enter
Can I do it too?
No way, we shouldn't
But I really want it

They said we can't
Tzuyang will announce the winner for that later at the end
[Me..?]
[Yes, you]
Will announce the winner
Me?
I forget things easily
How old are you again?
It's been getting worse
People like us need this
There's a feature called Galaxy Care
I have that too
We definitely need it
It's for the Galaxy phone
I'm sure everyone has it
There's also this thing called Director View

You remember it now?
You can take a photo from both the front and rear cameras
Put it to where you can see both of us
Are you okay?
[Able to film from both cameras]
Everyone's shocked
How's the chat?
[Chat: Tzuyang is pretty] Pretty
Sorry
A lot of them are amazed by the feature
But it truly is amazing
[Sharing is caring]
The quality is nice
It's pushed in together very well
There's like a chunk inside too
There are a lot more people watching us outside of YouTube

Did you know that? [Nope]
Oh, they're watching us
Please say hello
Nice to meet you all
These are the people that were picked to be on the show
Hello
Do you guys like Tzuyang?
We all know the answer to that
Hello
We can hear you
I'm a huge fan
Really?
[Buffering..?]
Yes
[Forced fan]
Do you have any questions for Tzuyang?

I want to know which nickname you like being called
I have a lot of nicknames
Since my name is Jung Won Park
Company names and stuff
When I was in high school,
I was Kirby
The character that eats everything in sight
Kirby!
Do you like that the most?
Kirby is cute
Hello
I enjoyed your ramyun mukbang yesterday
I watched it too
Still so good at eating
Thank you
I hope that you will continue to do mukbang for us

How do you maintain your weight? Do you have a boyfriend?
2 questions at once
As for my weight,
I used to eat 1 meal a day
But not anymore
I've been gaining weight
And I do not have a boyfriend
Okay
The guy has a huge smile on his face now
My son is very interested
We will be sending the 5 of you the Galaxy Watch 3
So good at eating
It's like I'm watching your stream
Amazing
Since I stream,
I need to use a good camera for the video quality

So I constantly need to purchase to update my phone
A lot of money goes into that
So you can use the Super Change
There's a thing called Super Change in KT
If you order the Galaxy S21 now
And if a new Galaxy comes out in 2 years,
You can get up to 50% off on that device if you have this program
Now that we talked about the Super Change,
As I mentioned earlier, we have more food for Tzuyang
What is that?
It's dessert
I'll call the chef
[The chef's V Caller Ring]
Looks like he was cooking
Click for the sound
I can't speak English

What should I do?
Hello Oh, hello!
Do you speak Korean?
[Head chef at the hotel]
[Chat: Sparks?]
What's up?
It's too cold
The frosting looks like paint
That's a good expression
It tastes like paint too
Nevermind, it's very sweet
[Back to the tteokgalbi]
Are you finished?
She finished 21 of them
Amazing Are you okay?
I shared

Still, you ate a lot
We still need to announce the winner before we end
Oh right, I need to pick
Over 100 entries
A lot of people entered
Who did this?
[History of the Galaxy]
Congratulations to the person that collected the Galaxy phones
Congrats on the Galaxy S21+
[Subtitles by Hyun Choi] [antharoni@gmail.com]
